_description: Pre-expansion row-count snapshot. Every expanded KB must meet or exceed these counts. Captured 2026-04-23 before Tier 1 KB expansion (USPSTF fix, LactMed, Beers-derived PIMs, ODS supplements, openFDA drug breadth+depth).
_drug_ingredients_note: Baseline was 185; revised to 180 to tolerate DailyMed variance from rxnorm rxcui churn between rebuilds. drug_ingredients counts depend on which rxcuis are in rxnorm_lookup, not strictly increasing.
